mapper.select: SELECT A."APPLY_NUM", A."JOB_NUM", A."MEMBER_NUM", A."APPLY_STATUS", A."APPLY_DATE", M."MEMBER_NAME", M."MEMBER_PHONE", M."MEMBER_EMAIL", J."JOB_TITLE" FROM "TB_JOB_APPLY" A INNER JOIN "TB_MEMBER" M ON A."MEMBER_NUM" = M."MEMBER_NUM" INNER JOIN "TB_JOB" J ON A."JOB_NUM" = J."JOB_NUM" WHERE A."JOB_NUM" = #{jobNum} AND A."APPLY_STATUS" != 'CANCEL' ORDER BY A."APPLY_NUM" DESC

SELECT A."APPLY_NUM", A."JOB_NUM", A."MEMBER_NUM", A."APPLY_STATUS", A."APPLY_DATE", J."JOB_TITLE", J."JOB_LOCATION", J."JOB_PAY", J."JOB_WORK_DAY", J."JOB_WORK_TIME" FROM "TB_JOB_APPLY" A INNER JOIN "TB_JOB" J ON A."JOB_NUM" = J."JOB_NUM" WHERE A."MEMBER_NUM" = #{memberNum} AND A."APPLY_STATUS" != 'CANCEL' ORDER BY A."APPLY_NUM" DESC
SELECT A."APPLY_NUM", A."JOB_NUM", A."MEMBER_NUM", A."APPLY_STATUS" FROM "TB_JOB_APPLY" A WHERE A."APPLY_NUM" = #{applyNum}
mapper.update: UPDATE "TB_JOB_APPLY" SET "APPLY_STATUS" = 'WAIT', "APPLY_DATE" = NOW() WHERE "JOB_NUM" = #{jobNum} AND "MEMBER_NUM" = #{memberNum} AND "APPLY_STATUS" = 'CANCEL'
